message: build: switch site tooling to pnpm and ox

files.patch:
@@ -33,10 +33,10 @@ I'm Peter Steinberger, an iOS developer, entrepreneur, and open source contribut
 
 | Command                | Action                                      |
 | :--------------------- | :------------------------------------------ |
-| `npm install`          | Installs dependencies                       |
-| `npm run dev`          | Starts local dev server at `localhost:4321` |
-| `npm run build`        | Build the production site to `./dist/`      |
-| `npm run preview`      | Preview the build locally, before deploying |
+| `pnpm install`         | Installs dependencies                       |
+| `pnpm run dev`         | Starts local dev server at `localhost:4321` |
+| `pnpm run build`       | Build the production site to `./dist/`      |
+| `pnpm run preview`     | Preview the build locally, before deploying |
 
 ## Deployment

@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 {
   "name": "steipete-astro",
-  "type": "module",
   "version": "0.0.1",
+  "type": "module",
   "scripts": {
     "dev": "astro dev",
     "build": "astro build && pagefind --site dist",
@@ -12,11 +12,12 @@
     "add-source-metadata": "node scripts/add-source-metadata.mjs",
     "remove-tags": "node scripts/remove-tags-from-posts.mjs",
     "sync": "astro sync",
-    "lint": "biome lint src",
-    "lint:fix": "biome lint --write src",
-    "format": "biome format --write src",
-    "check": "biome check src",
-    "check:fix": "biome check --write src",
+    "lint": "oxlint --deny-warnings --import-plugin --react-plugin src astro.config.mjs",
+    "lint:fix": "oxlint --fix --deny-warnings --import-plugin --react-plugin src astro.config.mjs",
+    "format": "git ls-files '*.js' '*.mjs' '*.cjs' '*.ts' '*.tsx' '*.json' | xargs oxfmt --write",
+    "format:check": "git ls-files '*.js' '*.mjs' '*.cjs' '*.ts' '*.tsx' '*.json' | xargs oxfmt --check",
+    "check": "pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint",
+    "check:fix": "pnpm run format && pnpm run lint:fix",
     "prepare": "husky"
   },
   "dependencies": {
@@ -49,12 +50,7 @@
     "tailwindcss": "^4.1.18",
     "typescript": "^5.9.3"
   },
-  "overrides": {
-    "esbuild": "^0.25.5",
-    "vite": "^6.3.5"
-  },
   "devDependencies": {
-    "@biomejs/biome": "^2.3.10",
     "@tailwindcss/postcss": "^4.1.18",
     "@tailwindcss/typography": "^0.5.19",
     "@types/lodash.kebabcase": "^4.1.9",
@@ -64,16 +60,27 @@
     "cz-conventional-changelog": "^3.3.0",
     "husky": "^9.1.7",
     "lint-staged": "^16.2.7",
+    "oxfmt": "^0.46.0",
+    "oxlint": "^1.61.0",
     "postcss": "^8.5.6"
   },
+  "overrides": {
+    "esbuild": "^0.25.5",
+    "vite": "^6.3.5"
+  },
+  "lint-staged": {
+    "*.{js,ts,tsx,json}": [
+      "oxfmt --write",
+      "oxlint --fix"
+    ]
+  },
   "config": {
     "commitizen": {
       "path": "./node_modules/cz-conventional-changelog"
     }
   },
-  "lint-staged": {
-    "*.{js,ts,tsx,json}": [
-      "biome check --write --files-ignore-unknown=true"
-    ]
-  }
+  "engines": {
+    "node": ">=24.0.0"
+  },
+  "packageManager": "pnpm@10.33.2"
 }

@@ -1,8 +1,8 @@
 {
-  "buildCommand": "npm run build",
+  "buildCommand": "pnpm run build",
   "outputDirectory": "dist",
-  "devCommand": "npm run dev",
-  "installCommand": "npm install",
+  "devCommand": "pnpm run dev",
+  "installCommand": "pnpm install --frozen-lockfile",
   "framework": "astro",
   "trailingSlash": false,
